backstory.original: The elder of Kir Sabal, Asharra is a stern and honorable aarakocra wizard who looks over her flock and the safety of the Omu royal family.
backstory.display: 身为克萨巴尔的长老，艾萨拉是一位严厉而可敬的翼爪鸟人法师，她维护着她的族群和奥穆王室的安全。

description.original: Asharra lets loose a barrage of missiles, hitting random targets.
description.display: 艾萨拉释放出魔法飞弹弹幕，攻击随机目标。

description.original: Asharra pushes back all enemies and casts a massive Fireball on a random one.
description.display: 艾萨拉击退所有敌人，并对随机目标施放一个大火球。

longDescription.original: Asharra leaps into the air, flapping her wings and pushing all enemies away from the party. Hovering there, she summons a massive fireball that hits a random enemy and all other enemies within a small radius.
longDescription.display: 艾萨拉跳到空中，挥动翅膀将所有敌人推离队伍。随后悬停在空中并召唤一个大火球，攻击一名随机敌人和小范围内的其他所有敌人。

description.desc: Increases the damage of Human Champions by $(amount)%.
人类勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Asharra forms a bond of friendship with the Human champions in your party, increasing their damage.
specializationDescription.display: 艾萨拉与队伍中的人类勇士结成友谊纽带，使其伤害提高。

tipText.original: Asharra has formed a bond of friendship with your Human champions. Focus on having those champions as your main damage dealers.
tipText.display: 艾萨拉与人类勇士结成友谊纽带，专注于使其成为主要伤害输出者。

description.desc: Increases the damage of Dwarven and Elven Champions (including Drow) by $(amount)%.
矮人与精灵（包括卓尔精灵）勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Asharra forms a bond of friendship with the Dwarf and Elf champions (including Drow and Eladrin) in your party, increasing their damage.
specializationDescription.display: 艾萨拉与队伍中的矮人及精灵勇士（包括卓尔精灵和雅灵）结成友谊纽带，使其伤害提高。

tipText.original: Asharra has formed a bond of friendship with your Dwarf and Elf champions (including Drow). Focus on having those champions as your main damage dealers.
tipText.display: 艾萨拉与矮人及精灵勇士（包括卓尔精灵）结成友谊纽带，专注于使其成为主要伤害输出者。

description.desc: Increases the damage of Aarakocra, Centaur, Dragonborn, Firbolg, Lizardfolk, Minotaur, Satyr, Tiefling, Tortle and Triton Champions by $(amount)%.
翼爪鸟人、半人马、龙裔、隐逸巨人、蜥蜴人、牛头人、半羊人、提夫林、龟人以及梭螺鱼人勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Asharra forms a bond of friendship with the Aarakocra, Centaur, Dragonborn, Firbolg, Lizardfolk, Minotaur, Satyr, Tiefling, Tortle and Triton champions in your party, increasing their damage.
specializationDescription.display: 艾萨拉与队伍中的翼爪鸟人、半人马、龙裔、隐逸巨人、蜥蜴人、牛头人、半羊人、提夫林、龟人以及梭螺鱼人勇士结成友谊纽带，使其伤害提高。

tipText.original: Asharra has formed a bond of friendship with your Aarakocra, Dragonborn, Firbolg, Lizardfolk, Minotaur, Tiefling, and Tortle champions. Focus on having those champions as your main damage dealers.
tipText.display: 艾萨拉与翼爪鸟人、龙裔、隐逸巨人、蜥蜴人、牛头人、提夫林以及龟人勇士结成友谊纽带，专注于使其成为主要伤害输出者。

description.pre: Increases the potency of each of Asharra's Bond abilties (separately) by $(not_buffed amount)% for every matching Bonded species in the party. Additionally, Asharra gains the effect of a given Bond if at least 4 Champions are affected by it
队伍中任何适用纽带技能的种族，都会为艾萨拉的相应纽带提升效力 $(not_buffed amount)%（单独计算）。另外，如果艾萨拉的某种纽带至少与 4 名勇士建立联系，则提升此纽带效果

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrades,100,90,91,92","description":"Increases the effect of Asharra's Bond abilities by $(amount)%."}
{"effect_string":"buff_upgrades,200,90,91,92","description":"Increases the effect of Asharra's Bond abilities by $(amount)%."}
{"effect_string":"buff_upgrades,200,90,91,92","description":"Increases the effect of Asharra's Bond abilities by $(amount)%."}

description.desc: Whenever the party is under attack, Asharra takes flight and increases her damage by $(not_buffed amount)% every 5 seconds, stacking multiplicatively up to 20 times
队伍成员遭受攻击时，艾萨拉飞离地面，并每 5 秒提升 $(not_buffed amount) % 自身伤害。能够以乘算方式堆叠最多 20 层

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrades,200,90,91,92","description":"Increases the effect of Asharra's Bond abilities by $(amount)%."}
{"effect_string":"buff_upgrades,200,90,91,92","description":"Increases the effect of Asharra's Bond abilities by $(amount)%."}

description.desc: Increases the damage of Half-Elf, Half-Orc and Halfling Champions by $(amount)%.
使半精灵、半兽人和半身人勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Asharra forms a bond of friendship with any Half-Elf, Half-Orc and Halfling champions in your party, increasing their damage.
specializationDescription.display: 艾萨拉与队伍中的半精灵，半兽人和半身人勇士结成友谊纽带，使其伤害提高。

tipText.original: Asharra has formed a bond of friendship with your Half-Elf, Half-Orc and Halfling champions. Focus on having those champions as your main damage dealers.
tipText.display: 艾萨拉与半精灵，半兽人和半身人勇士结成友谊纽带，专注于使其成为主要伤害输出者。

description.desc: Increases the damage of Aasimar, Bullywug, Doppelganger, Genasi, Giff, Gith, Goliath, Harengon, Kalashtar, Saurial, Tabaxi, Thri-kreen, Warforged, Modron, and Yuan-ti Champions by $(amount)%.
使神裔、狂蛙人、变形怪、元素裔、吉夫人、吉斯人、巨人、兔人、卡拉史塔人、爬虫人、斑猫人、螳螂人、机关人、魔冢与蛇人勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Asharra forms a bond of friendship with any Aasimar, Bullywug, Doppelganger, Genasi, Giff, Gith, Goliath, Harengon, Kalashtar, Saurial, Tabaxi , Warforged, and Yuan-ti champions in your party, increasing their damage.
specializationDescription.display: 艾萨拉与队伍中的神裔、狂蛙人、变形怪、元素裔、吉夫人、吉斯人、巨人、兔人、卡拉史塔人、爬虫人、斑猫人、机关人及蛇人勇士结成友谊纽带，使其伤害提高。

tipText.original: Asharra has formed a bond of friendship with your Aasimar, Genasi, Gith, Goliath, Saurial, Tabaxi , Warforged, and Yuan-ti champions. Focus on having those champions as your main damage dealers.
tipText.display: 艾萨拉与神裔、元素裔、吉斯人、巨人、爬虫人、斑猫人、机关人及蛇人勇士结成友谊纽带，专注于使其成为主要伤害输出者。

description.desc: Increase the damage of NERDS and Small Champions by $(amount)%. (Small Champions are fairy, gnome, goblin, halfling, kender, kobold, and plasmoid Champions.)
使仙女、侏儒、地精、半身人、坎德人、狗头人、呆宝和等离子勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Asharra forms a bond of friendship with any Fairy, Gnome, Goblin, Halfling, Kender, Kobold, NERDS, and Plasmoid champions in your party, increasing their damage.
specializationDescription.display: 艾萨拉与你队伍中的任何侏儒、地精、仙女、半身人、坎德人、呆宝们和等离子勇士建立友谊羁绊，增加他们的伤害。

tipText.original: Asharra has formed a bond of friendship with your Fairy, Gnome, Goblin, Halfling, Kender, Kobold, NERDS, and Plasmoid champions. Focus on having those champions as your main damage dealers.
tipText.display: 艾萨拉与你的仙女、侏儒、地精、半身人、坎德人、呆宝人、狗头人和等离子冠军们结下了友谊。让这些勇士成为你的主要伤害输出者吧。

description.original: My enemies will rue the day they met me.
description.display: 我的敌人将为遇到我而后悔。

description.original: The fate of Kir Sabal is in my hands.
description.display: 克萨巴尔的命运就在我的手中。

description.original: I feel a special bond with you.
description.display: 我感到和你有种特殊的联系。

description.original: My people follow me. Will you?
description.display: 我的人民会追随我，你会吗？

effects.description: Increases the effect of Asharra's Bond abilities by $(amount)%.

description.original: My ancestors watch over us. We must stand together now, for the fate of all.
description.display: 我们的祖先守护着我们。现在，为了所有人的命运，我们必须团结一致。

effects.description: Increases the effect of both bonuses in Asharra's Paragon of Kir Sabal upgrade by $amount%. Asharra also counts as a Druid.

character_sheet_details.backstory: The elder of Kir Sabal, Asharra is a stern and honorable aarakocra wizard who looks over her flock and the safety of the Omu royal family.
身为克萨巴尔的长老，艾萨拉是一位严厉而可敬的翼爪鸟人法师，她维护着她的族群和奥穆王室的安全。

effects.description: 使艾萨拉的“克萨巴尔的楷模”进阶中的两项加成效果均提升 $amount%。艾萨拉也算作一名德鲁伊。
